tracks.lane: Local Python Apple Silicon MLX Service

tracks.label: Faster-Whisper Base
tracks.status_detail: Validated paced /v1/stt/stream artifact refreshed on 2026-06-20. This lane now anchors the primary comparable live leaderboard while the remaining /ws/stream artifacts stay published as supporting evidence.

tracks.label: Parakeet 110M NeMo
tracks.status_detail: Validated paced /v1/stt/stream Compose CPU artifact refreshed on 2026-06-21.

tracks.label: Qwen MPS
tracks.status_detail: Validated paced /v1/stt/stream local Apple Silicon MPS artifact refreshed on 2026-06-21. This lane now publishes comparable live partial and final timing, with much faster audio-end finalization than the legacy /ws/stream result it replaces.

tracks.label: Faster-Whisper Small
tracks.status_detail: Validated paced /v1/stt/stream artifact refreshed on 2026-06-20. This lane is now directly comparable on the live leaderboard, even though Faster-Whisper Base remains the stronger default for turn-taking.

tracks.label: Parakeet 0.6B Compose
tracks.status_detail: Validated paced /v1/stt/stream artifact refreshed on 2026-06-20. This Compose lane now publishes comparable live partial and final timing, but it still finalizes more slowly than the Faster-Whisper Base local CPU baseline.

tracks.label: Qwen Compose
tracks.status_detail: Validated paced /v1/stt/stream Compose CPU artifact refreshed on 2026-06-21 using float16.

tracks.label: Pipecat E2E Faster-Whisper Base
tracks.status_detail: Checked-in single-sample Pipecat E2E artifact refreshed on 2026-06-19 using synthesized real-time speech normalized to 16 kHz, 20 ms source frames, and 100 ms websocket chunks. It stays out of the homepage leaderboard until comparable Pipecat E2E artifacts exist across multiple backends.
